ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "municipality" TEXT /* Municipality where the station is located */,
  "num_docks" INTEGER /* Number of docks available at the station */,
  "station_number" TEXT /* Station number for administrative purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the station */,
  "available_docks" INTEGER /* Number of available docks at the station */,
  "nearby_attractions" TEXT /* Nearby points of interest or attractions */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., regular, premium, or event-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bike (e.g., available, in use) */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* ID of the station where the bike is currently docked */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the bike */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the bike was last maintained */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., regular, electric, or tandem) */,
  "rental_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the bike is rented */,
  "last_rental_date" TEXT /* Date of the last rental */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals for the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's membership (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "membership_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's membership */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* User's emergency contact information */,
  "rental_history" TEXT /* User's rental history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being rented */,
  "start_station_id" TEXT /* ID of the station where the rental started */,
  "end_station_id" TEXT /* ID of the station where the rental ended */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the rental started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the rental ended */,
  "trip_distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the rental period */,
  "trip_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the rental period */,
  "rental_status" TEXT /* Status of the rental (e.g., in progress, completed, or cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental for which the payment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the rental */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal, or cash) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed, or pending) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount in case of cancelled rentals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES rentals ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., bike, station) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike or station */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., scheduled, in progress, or completed) */,
  "maintenance_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the maintenance (e.g., high, medium, or low) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Administrator's password (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
